channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects -FW6 Potholes problem, 16th March
item.description:
NWD plus pothole IN GRASS VERGE 1000x600x70mm top soil to make safe (FW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 9 inches deep 4 feet long.It is big enough for the front of vehicles to bottom on the road.It is very dangerous as it has been filled with water most of the time recently., 16th March
item.description:
This is on the road on the exit side of Tesco opposite the railway station,Queens Road.Its in constant use.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 77, Queen's Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 16th March
item.description:
CWPH STATS REQUIRED AROUND IRONWORKS 400 X 400 X 50mm Aprox LANE CLOSURE NO MARKED (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep pot hole at junction of roundabout from Moorend Road/Moorend Park Road/ Moorend Grove, 16th March
item.description:
Junction of roundabout from Moorend Road/Moorend Park Road/ Moorend Grove. Close to Southerndown, Moorend Road. GL53 0HB
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 69, Moorend Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 16th March
item.description:
Permanent repair for 2 hour make safe Give and take 28 day plus temporary footway/cycle path closure footway aburt level difference in grass verge 2000x1200x300mm top soil (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 16th March
item.description:
Give and take 28 day plus temporary footway/cycle path closure footway aburt level difference 700x120x40mm tarmac parch stats required (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 16th March
item.description:
Give and take 28 day plus temporary footway/cycle path closure please sweep debris tree branches from footway approx 70 metres x 1800mm (Debris/Obstruction in CW)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Road Markings problem, 16th March
item.description:
Road closure 28 day please refresh give way markings markings approx 600x200mm x21 plus x1 3 meter line plus x1 triangle (Faded Road Markings)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 16th March
item.description:
Give and take 28 day plus temporary footway/cycle path closure please sweep debris tree branches from footway approx 30metres x 1800mm (Debris/Obstruction in CW)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 16th March
item.description:
2 way stop and go 28 day please lift and relay x1 sunken kerb stone 900x100x60mm stats required (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 16th March
item.description:
Give and take 28 day plus temporary footway/cycle path closure please sweep debris tree branches from footway approx 50metres x 1800mm (Debris/Obstruction in CW)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -FW6 Potholes problem, 16th March
item.description:
Stop and go 28 day plus temporary footway closure footway pothole 200x200x50mm by bt cover required stats required (FW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 16th March
item.description:
Give and take 28 day please repair x1 chipped kerb stone 150x100x30mm approx with concrete fillet (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 16th March
item.description:
2 way stop and go 28 day with temporary footway closure please cut back overgrown brambles and vegetation growing out into footway back to boundary approx 80 meters (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 16th March
item.description:
2 way stop and go 28 day plus temporary footway closure please sweep debris lose chipping stones of footway approx 60metres x (Debris/Obstruction in CW)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 16th March
item.description:
Give and take 28 day plus temporary footway/cycle path closure footway aburt level difference with white rubber edging kerb please make safe screw back down to footway 300x150x22mm (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 16th March
item.description:
Give and take 28 day plus temporary footway/cycle path closure please sweep debris tree branches from footway approx 30metres x 1800mm (Debris/Obstruction in CW)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 16th March
item.description:
2 way stop and go 28 day please remove x2 rotten leaning sign post approx 2 meters high to make safe (Damaged Sign Post)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 16th March
item.description:
2 way stop and go 28 day plus temporary footway closure please sweep debris fallen cones from of footway /cycle path approx 50metres x (Debris/Obstruction in CW)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 16th March
item.description:
2 way stop and go 28 day please lift and reset x1 sunken broardbox cover and frame approx 600x400x35mm stats required (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)
Report on FixMyStreet
